items.name: Beanie
items.description:
The Blue Winter Cap brings a crisp, cool tone to your avatar’s winter wardrobe. Finished in a striking shade of blue, this cap complements casual outfits, snowy maps, and seasonal role-play with style. Match it with your favorite coat, scarf, or streetwear look for a standout winter statement.

items.name: Gothic Cat Tail
items.description:
This sleek black feline tail is adorned with intricate silver chains and a gothic cross charm, giving it a mysterious and rebellious edge. Perfect for avatars with a gothic, alternative, or supernatural aesthetic. Add a touch of feline grace and dark allure to your look! ✨🌙
